themes.label: Trading Issues
themes.description: Reviews mentioning problems with trading, such as glitches, delays, or incorrect order execution, which resulted in financial losses for the users.

themes.label: App Performance
themes.description: Reviews discussing the app's performance, including issues like lag, crashes, or unresponsiveness, which affected the users' experience.

themes.label: Feature Requests
themes.description: Reviews suggesting new features or improvements to existing ones, such as adding more technical indicators, timeframes, or custom portfolio splits.
